title: Ukraine to Make Drone Videos Available for Training A.I. Models
summary_full: Despite ethical concerns about using battlefield videos to train artificial intelligence, Ukraine’s defense ministry said it needs to improve A.I. targeting to compete with Russia.
summary_public: Despite ethical concerns about using battlefield videos to train artificial intelligence, Ukraine’s defense ministry said it needs to improve A.I. targeting to compete with Russia.

UA.label: positive
UA.evidence: improve A.I. targeting to compete with Russia
